title: StupiCraft
description: A large mod featuring a series of blocks, items, and tools, bridging the gap between other tools, or making the bridge longer.
body:
An actively growing mod with the goal of increasing mid- to late-game complexity. StupiCraft is my first NeoForge release, along with my first >1.20.1 release. Many recipes are designed to be automated to an extent, so make sure you know how to use the Crafter!
Currently, StupiCraft contains:
- Steel - A classic material, made with an Iron Ingot and Coke.
- Steel Coke - A material used for making Steel, adds Carbon, made by smelting coal.
- Red Iron - A special material made by smoking Iron with Coke, combine with Coke again for Red Steel.
- Steel/Red Steel tools - Equivalent tools for each steel type, slightly better than Iron, expect a Red Steel rebalance.
- Steel Fibers, Mesh, and Fabric - Made for high-flexibility and strength applications.
- Chipped Obsidian - Made by bottling the tears of Crying Obsidian.
- Obsidian Shard - Used to make Obsidian Ingots.
- Obsidian Ingot - A good material used for high-heat tolerant items.
- Obsidian Bricks - A good looking dark brick block.
- Steel Mold Lining - Part of a Steel-Obsidian Mold, fairly simple.
- Steel-Obsidian Mold - Made with an Obsidian Ingot, used for melting and forming special materials.
- Tungsten - A dense, strong material with a high melting point.
- Unfinished/Plating Template - A simple tool for plating a tool in Tungsten.
- Tungsten Tools - Made by plating a diamond tool, increases durability.
- Osmium - The element with the highest melting point, has some special applications.
- Reinforced Bottle - Made with Steel Mesh and Tungsten, can withstand Obsidian Tears.
- Molybdenum - An odd ore, with some niche applications.
- Rhenium - An incredibly rare ore with some valuable uses, its nickel alloy has among the highest temperaute tolerances of any material.
- Nickel - Used to make the Rhenium-Nickel Super Alloy (Yes, that is what it is actually called).
- Advanced Furnace - An in-progress block, with no crafting recipe until I can make it work. Intended to simplify the creation of certain specialized materials.
- Thermal Bricks - A special high-heat tolerant and heavily insulating material.
- Nickel-Iron Battery - A simple, fairly unefficient battery, trying to give it a good use.
- Oxidization Chamber - A specialized device for rapidly oxidizing an object.
- Rusted Iron - A product of Iron from the Oxi. Chamber, used to make Iron Oxide.
- Iron Oxide - The powdered form of rust, used for some late-game items.
- Flowing Bedrock - A special material of still-forming bedrock. Mine and bucket.
- Unrefined Flowing Bedrock Remnant - A mouthful of a name but an incredibly important resource for the late-game, can be broken apart for some materials.
- Magmarite Ore - A Nether-specific ore containing fairly pure Magmarite, typically noticable by its glowing-red cracked surface.
- Magmarite - A refined form of the U.F.B.R. with an increased therma; capacity, Magmarite has been heated severly and is unstable,
- Magmarite Rod - A special energy-storage method converting the released energy from the reacting Iron Oxide and Magmarite.
- Magmarite Explosive - An incredibly powerful bomb made with Magmarite, activate it with a Magmarite Rod and run. If destroyed, no matter if it is primed or not, it will detonate.
- Interamnium - A rare natural resource and the inverse of Magmarite, being cooled incredibly cold, though with Magmarite's high thermal capacity.
- Interamnium Powder - A crushed and powderized form of Interamnium, used to make Interamnium Ingots.
- Interamnium Ingot - An ingot made of Interamnium, constantly cold.
- Graphite - A common carbon-based metal, typically used in pencils, ~~or in nuclear reactors.~~
- Refined Graphite - A much denser, stronger version of Graphite.
This mod is in HEAVY development, while it has many recipes, it is no where near ready for a true, full release, but that doesn't mean you can't have fun!
